name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a quick note before the day kicks off. Yesterday brought a few new faces to the practice and some movement on the schedule — nothing that needs your attention right now, just wanted you to have the lay of the land.

Everything's running smoothly. We'll be here when you need us.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
